mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM c7d2503t1p1.receipts WHERE file_hash = #{fileHash}
SELECT * FROM c7d2503t1p1.receipts ORDER BY upload_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point ( member_idx, change_reason, change_amount, point_status ) VALUES ( #{member_idx}, '영수증 인증 적립', FLOOR(#{ocr_amount} * 0.05), -- SQL에서 직접 5% 계산 (소수점 버림) '적립' )
